---
title: "Dashboards"
---

Dashboards are used to graphically display data returned from processes and applications, or display data as easily categorized and sorted reports. Dashboards contain multiple items, including basic pie charts and bar graphs, which allow users to quickly identify relevant information and trends.

![An example of data visualization in Dashboards. The example includes a numerical summary, a pie chart, and graphs of data trends.](data:image/gif;base64,)  Note: Dashboards are available for application runtime versions starting from 7.20.0-rc.379. To check the application runtime version, see Viewing Application Configuration. If you have an application with a previous runtime version, see Updating the Runtime Version of Applications to update it.
The following dashboard types can be selected from the Dashboard drop-down menu:

-  Process Summary
-  User Summary
-  Task Summary

Data from each of the dashboards can be downloaded using the Export JSON button.
